attacking_style: No attacking pattern evident across observations. Operates defensively, focused on survival and positioning rather than offensive moves, even on gradient finishes where no capacity shown.
team_tactics: Utilized as super-domestique in breakaways for stage hunting rather than protected GC leader. Teams position him aggressively late in stages for defensive GC purposes, not offensive firepower.
terrain_preference: Time trials remain his strength (sub-10 minute barrier, third place finishes). Mountain stages and summit finishes expose limitations, particularly on sustained gradients where dropped repeatedly.
vulnerability: Recovery deficit after hard TT efforts; dropped on climbs following time trial exertion. Moderate summit finishes expose form weaknesses inside 15km. Illness-related abandonments suggest fragility.
key_patterns: Dropped on moderate climbs inside 15km multiple times, indicating threshold issues (2+ observations)
Strong time trial performances but fails to carry form into subsequent mountain stages (2 observations)
Tactical role shifted from GC contender to super-domestique/stage hunter by 2022 (2 observations)
No offensive climbing capacity shown even when surviving in lead groups (2 observations)
Teams display defensive anxiety about his positioning rather than enabling attacks (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 observations show consistent struggles on climbs, role demotion to domestique, illness abandonment, and recovery deficits despite solid TT performance. Clear decline from GC contender status.
